enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DAC Channel X disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: DAC Channel X enabled

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DAC Channel X trigger disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: DAC Channel X trigger enabled

fields.name: TSEL1
fields.description: DAC channel1 trigger selection These bits select the external event used to trigger DAC channel1. Note: Only used if bit TEN1 = 1 (DAC channel1 trigger enabled).

enum_values.name: Swtrig
enum_values.description: Software trigger

enum_values.name: Tim1Trgo
enum_values.description: Timer 1 TRGO event

enum_values.name: Tim2Trgo
enum_values.description: Timer 2 TRGO event

enum_values.name: Tim4Trgo
enum_values.description: Timer 4 TRGO event

enum_values.name: Tim5Trgo
enum_values.description: Timer 5 TRGO event

enum_values.name: Tim6Trgo
enum_values.description: Timer 6 TRGO event

enum_values.name: Tim7Trgo
enum_values.description: Timer 7 TRGO event

enum_values.name: Tim8Trgo
enum_values.description: Timer 8 TRGO event

enum_values.name: Tim15Trgo
enum_values.description: Timer 15 TRGO event

enum_values.name: Lptim1Out
enum_values.description: LPTIM1 OUT event

enum_values.name: Lptim2Out
enum_values.description: LPTIM2 OUT event

enum_values.name: Exti9
enum_values.description: EXTI line 9

enum_values.name: Lptim2or3Out
enum_values.description: LPTIM2 (DAC1)/ LPTIM3 (DAC2) OUT event

fields.name: WAVE%s
fields.description: DAC channel%s noise/triangle wave generation enable

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: Wave generation disabled

enum_values.name: Noise
enum_values.description: Noise wave generation enabled

enum_values.name: Amp1
enum_values.description: Unmask bit0 of LFSR/ triangle amplitude equal to 1

enum_values.name: Amp3
enum_values.description: Unmask bits[1:0] of LFSR/ triangle amplitude equal to 3

enum_values.name: Amp7
enum_values.description: Unmask bits[2:0] of LFSR/ triangle amplitude equal to 7

enum_values.name: Amp15
enum_values.description: Unmask bits[3:0] of LFSR/ triangle amplitude equal to 15

enum_values.name: Amp31
enum_values.description: Unmask bits[4:0] of LFSR/ triangle amplitude equal to 31

enum_values.name: Amp63
enum_values.description: Unmask bits[5:0] of LFSR/ triangle amplitude equal 63

enum_values.name: Amp127
enum_values.description: Unmask bits[6:0] of LFSR/ triangle amplitude equal to 127

enum_values.name: Amp255
enum_values.description: Unmask bits[7:0] of LFSR/ triangle amplitude equal to 255

enum_values.name: Amp511
enum_values.description: Unmask bits[8:0] of LFSR/ triangle amplitude equal to 511

enum_values.name: Amp1023
enum_values.description: Unmask bits[9:0] of LFSR/ triangle amplitude equal to 1023

enum_values.name: Amp2047
enum_values.description: Unmask bits[10:0] of LFSR/ triangle amplitude equal to 2047

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DAC Channel X DMA mode disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: DAC Channel X DMA mode enabled

fields.name: DMAUDRIE%s
fields.description: DAC channel%s DMA Underrun Interrupt enable

enum_values.name: Disabled
enum_values.description: DAC channel X DMA Underrun Interrupt disabled

enum_values.name: Enabled
enum_values.description: DAC channel X DMA Underrun Interrupt enabled

enum_values.name: Normal
enum_values.description: DAC Channel X Normal operating mode

enum_values.name: Calibration
enum_values.description: DAC Channel X calibration mode

fields.name: TSEL2
fields.description: DAC channel2 trigger selection These bits select the external event used to trigger DAC channel2 Note: Only used if bit TEN2 = 1 (DAC channel2 trigger enabled).

enum_values.name: NoTrigger
enum_values.description: No trigger

enum_values.name: Trigger
enum_values.description: Trigger

fields.name: DACCDHR
fields.description: DAC channel1 12-bit right-aligned data These bits are written by software which specifies 12-bit data for DAC channel1.

registers.name: DHR12L%s
registers.description: channel%s 12-bit left aligned data holding register

fields.name: DACCDHR
fields.description: DAC channel1 12-bit left-aligned data These bits are written by software which specifies 12-bit data for DAC channel1.

registers.name: DHR8R%s
registers.description: channel%s 8-bit right aligned data holding register

fields.name: DACCDHR
fields.description: DAC channel1 8-bit right-aligned data These bits are written by software which specifies 8-bit data for DAC channel1.

registers.name: DHR12RD
registers.description: Dual DAC 12-bit right-aligned data holding register

registers.name: DHR12LD
registers.description: DUAL DAC 12-bit left aligned data holding register

registers.name: DHR8RD
registers.description: DUAL DAC 8-bit right aligned data holding register

fields.name: DACCDOR
fields.description: DAC channel1 data output These bits are read-only, they contain data output for DAC channel1.

enum_values.name: NoUnderrun
enum_values.description: No DMA underrun error condition occurred for DAC channel x

enum_values.name: Underrun
enum_values.description: DMA underrun error condition occurred for DAC channel x (the currently selected trigger is driving DAC channel1 conversion at a frequency higher than the DMA service capability rate)

enum_values.name: Lower
enum_values.description: Calibration trimming value is lower than the offset correction value

enum_values.name: Equal_Higher
enum_values.description: Calibration trimming value is equal or greater than the offset correction value

fields.name: BWST%s
fields.description: DAC channel%s busy writing sample time flag

enum_values.name: Idle
enum_values.description: There is no write operation of DAC_SHSR1 ongoing: DAC_SHSR1 can be written

enum_values.name: Busy
enum_values.description: There is a write operation of DAC_SHSR1 ongoing: DAC_SHSR1 cannot be written

enum_values.name: NormalPinBuffer
enum_values.description: Normal mode - DAC channelx is connected to external pin with Buffer enabled

enum_values.name: NormalPinChipBuffer
enum_values.description: Normal mode - DAC channelx is connected to external pin and to on chip peripherals with Buffer enabled

enum_values.name: NormalPinNoBuffer
enum_values.description: Normal mode - DAC channelx is connected to external pin with Buffer disabled

enum_values.name: NormalChipNoBuffer
enum_values.description: Normal mode - DAC channelx is connected to on chip peripherals with Buffer disabled

enum_values.name: SHPinBuffer
enum_values.description: S&H mode - DAC channelx is connected to external pin with Buffer enabled

enum_values.name: SHPinChipBuffer
enum_values.description: S&H mode - DAC channelx is connected to external pin and to on chip peripherals with Buffer enabled

enum_values.name: SHPinNoBuffer
enum_values.description: S&H mode - DAC channelx is connected to external pin and to on chip peripherals with Buffer disabled

enum_values.name: SHChipNoBuffer
enum_values.description: S&H mode - DAC channelx is connected to on chip peripherals with Buffer disabled

registers.name: SHSR%s
registers.description: DAC channel%s sample and hold sample time register

fields.name: TSAMPLE
fields.description: DAC Channel 1 sample Time (only valid in sample & hold mode) These bits can be written when the DAC channel1 is disabled or also during normal operation. in the latter case, the write can be done only when BWSTx of DAC_SR register is low, If BWSTx=1, the write operation is ignored.

registers.name: SHHR
registers.description: DAC Sample and Hold hold time register

fields.name: THOLD%s
fields.description: DAC channel%s hold time (only valid in Sample and hold mode)

registers.name: SHRR
registers.description: DAC Sample and Hold refresh time register

fields.name: TREFRESH%s
fields.description: DAC channel%s refresh time (only valid in Sample and hold mode)
